name: Everstage Sales Commission Automation REST API
what_it_does: Everstage sales commission automation REST API for revenue operations teams to automate incentive compensation management, commission calculation, rep-facing earnings dashboards, and payout processing — enabling AI agents to retrieve payee commission data, sync transaction records, query plan attainment, and integrate compensation outcomes with CRM and HCM platforms through Everstage's no-code ICM platform. Enables AI agents to manage payee management for sales representative enrollment and compensation plan assignment automation, handle earnings management for commission calculation and period-specific payout retrieval automation, access data management for CRM deal and revenue data ingestion and refresh automation, retrieve statement management for rep commission statement generation and distribution automation, manage plan management for compensation plan structure and incentive tier configuration query automation, handle quota management for quota assignment and quota attainment tracking automation, access analytics management for compensation analytics, payout trend, and plan ROI reporting automation, retrieve integration management for Salesforce, HubSpot, and CRM data sync status monitoring automation, manage dispute management for commission dispute submission and resolution tracking automation, and integrate Everstage with Salesforce, HubSpot, Workday, and ADP for automated sales commission management.
use_cases: Syncing closed-won deal data from Salesforce to trigger commission calculations for revenue operations agents
Retrieving rep commission summaries and statements for payroll and compensation transparency automation agents
Monitoring plan attainment and identifying comp plan performance issues for sales leadership reporting agents
Automating commission dispute investigation and resolution for comp operations efficiency agents
not_for: Base payroll and HR compensation management (Everstage is variable sales comp ICM; ADP and Workday serve base payroll)
Sales forecasting and pipeline analytics (Everstage is commission management; Salesforce and Clari serve forecasting)
Territory and quota planning (Everstage tracks quota attainment; Xactly Align and Anaplan serve quota planning)
best_when: A RevOps or finance team wanting AI agents to automate CRM data ingestion, commission calculation, rep statement delivery, and comp data integration with HCM and payroll through Everstage's modern no-code ICM platform.
avoid_when: EVERSTAGE ACCOUNT IS REQUIRED: Everstage serves enterprises; automated open-developer assumption creates account_required for organizations without Everstage subscription; automated must have active Everstage account. CRM INTEGRATION IS REQUIRED FOR DATA: Everstage pulls transaction data through CRM connectors; automated direct-data assumption creates no_transactions for commission calculations without configured CRM data source; automated must configure and validate CRM integration before querying commissions. CALCULATION IS PERIODIC: Everstage calculates commissions based on configured calculation schedule; automated real-time assumption creates outdated_commission for results between calculation runs; automated must understand calculation schedule and trigger refresh before querying final values. API IS PRIMARILY FOR DATA RETRIEVAL: Everstage API is optimized for data export and integration; automated full-config-via-api assumption creates limited_functionality for attempts to configure compensation plans programmatically via API; automated must use Everstage UI for plan configuration.

auth.notes: Everstage uses API key and OAuth2 for Commission Automation REST API. REST API with JSON. Chennai, India HQ (US: New York, NY). Founded 2020 by Siva Rajamani and Vivek Suriyamoorthy (ex-Chargebee, Freshworks). Raised $30M (Y Combinator W21, Elevation Capital, 3one4 Capital). Products: Everstage Platform (ICM), Everstage Payee Experience (rep dashboard), Everstage Insights. 200+ enterprise customers. G2 high performer. No-code commission plan builder. Competes with CaptivateIQ, Xactly, and Salesforce Spiff for modern ICM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per payee; platform and insights modules; SMB and enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Chennai India/New York NY. $30M raised (YC W21, Elevation). 200+ customers. Per-payee annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per token; commission data APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: PLAN PERIOD IS REQUIRED FOR EARNINGS: Everstage earnings queries require specifying plan period (month, quarter); automated unscoped assumption creates empty_response for queries without plan period parameter; automated must specify target compensation period

DATA SYNC LATENCY AFFECTS ACCURACY: CRM data sync to Everstage has latency between CRM close and commission calculation; automated instant-commission assumption creates stale_commission for earnings queries immediately after CRM deal close; automated must account for sync latency before expecting updated commission values

PAYEE MAPPING IS REQUIRED: Everstage payee IDs must be mapped to CRM user IDs; automated same-ID assumption creates commission_not_found for earnings queries using CRM IDs without payee mapping configuration; automated must configure and maintain payee-to-CRM-user mapping

DISPUTE WORKFLOW IS HUMAN-GATED: Commission disputes require human compensation manager review; automated auto-resolve assumption creates dispute_pending for programmatic resolution attempts requiring manager approval; automated must implement human review step for dispute resolution workflows

WEBHOOK EVENTS ARE CALCULATION-TRIGGERED: Everstage webhooks fire on calculation completion, not CRM data arrival; automated data-event assumption creates missed_webhook for systems expecting events on CRM data ingestion rather than calculation completion
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sales compensation/ICM. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Commission, payee, and earnings data (PII).

security_score_components.security_notes: ICM/sales comp. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Individual commission and earnings data (PII).
